incorrect.claim: Stair riser heights do not sum to the total floor-to-floor height (Certain)
incorrect.why: Stair has 18 risers across two runs (10 east + 8 south) at ~6-11/16" each — compliant with IRC max of 7-3/4". Model is claiming non-compliant geometry that does not exist.

categories.label: Schedule-to-Drawing
categories.desc: Door and window schedule entries that conflict with what is drawn on plans or elevations — wrong widths, wrong materials, wrong finishes for the assigned room.

categories.label: Dimensional / Geometric
categories.desc: Dimension discrepancies between sheets, conflicting datums, wall assembly totals that don't match their component layers, and missing code-critical dimensions.

categories.label: Spec-to-Drawing Conflicts
categories.desc: Conflicts between the project specifications and the drawn documents — different products, different quantities, different performance requirements, different assembly configurations.

categories.label: Building Envelope
categories.desc: Vapor control, air barrier continuity, insulation placement and values, flashing details, and whether wall and roof assemblies perform appropriately for the project climate.

categories.label: Code and Life Safety
categories.desc: Egress paths, minimum door and railing dimensions, fire separation requirements, makeup air for exhaust systems, and other conditions requiring code compliance.

categories.label: Constructability
categories.desc: Whether details can physically be built as drawn — door swing clearances, missing flashing, system conflicts, and architectural elements that require coordination not shown.

categories.label: Completeness and Clarity
categories.desc: Missing tags, orphaned keynotes, TBD items that prevent accurate bidding, dead cross-references, deferred design decisions, and annotations that are ambiguous or absent.

issues.summary: Door 10-1 in schedule; Room 10 has no door on plans
Door 09-2 width 5'-0" in schedule; enlarged plan shows 4'-0"
Window type 6 count: 8 in schedule, only 7 on plans/elevations
Powder Room (14) assigned F-4 carpet — inappropriate for wet room
Entry Hall east wall WD-1 in schedule; interior elevations show P-1
Door 03-1 METAL in schedule; frame says WOOD; details show wood door
Garage (Room 15) assigned F-4 carpet in finish schedule; should be F-5
Reading Nook walls assigned WD-1 in schedule; specs require WD-4
Interior elevation 5 on A7.02 labeled 'Guest Bathroom 19'; Room 19 is Guest Closet — bathroom is Room 18
Office length 11'-6" on A2.01 vs 11'-5" on A2.01B
Crawl space datum 501'-0" on north elevation; 502'-0" on all others
E-3 wall total annotated as 8"; layers sum to 8-9/16"
Grid D–E: 6'-10.5" on A2.01; 6'-11.5" on enlarged plans
Stair headroom not dimensioned on either stair section
Crawl space elevation annotations unclear relative to datums
Windows: specs say Andersen 400 Series; schedule lists Marvin Ultrex
Wall insulation: specs say 1" ZIP R-sheathing; drawings show 1.5" rigid
WD-3 cladding: specs say South+West facades; elevations show South+East
Hose bibs: specs say 3; elevations show 5 Aquor House Hydrants
Ceiling insulation: specs say R-49; code summary and assembly calculate R-53
Specs imply single 3"/12" slope; roof plan shows 3", 2", and 1/4" slopes
E-2 wall assembly drawn with 2x8 studs; specs require 2x6
SS-3 flagstone: dry-laid patio + wet-laid ramp shown; specs don't distinguish
Specs call for SS-2 limestone in Entry/Laundry/Powder; schedule assigns generic F-2
Weather barrier label removed from E-3 wall assembly; E-4 retains it
E-1 CMU insulation changed from 2" to 1/2"; far below R-10 requirement
Sill flashing (A4.11/2) reversed — laps under WRB instead of over
Second vapor barrier on exterior of E-1 CMU — double VB traps moisture
Rigid insulation inboard of sheathing in E-3/E-4 — condensation risk in CZ 4A
Air barrier continuity not detailed at wall-roof, wall-foundation, or penetration transitions
Door 14-1 (Powder Room) scheduled at 1'-10" — below minimum door width
South deck section cable railing at 26" — below 36" minimum guard height
Bedroom egress: some sleeping rooms may rely on fixed windows that cannot provide egress
Garage fire separation not explicitly identified: wall, door rating, ceiling all ambiguous
Pool barrier cable spacing not detailed (4" max opening required by code)
Range hood 650 CFM; makeup air not specified (IRC requires provisions above 400 CFM)
Level 2 above garage: floor assembly F-1 specifies 1/2" gypsum; Type X required
Door 16-1 (garage-to-hallway) self-closing hardware not specified per IRC
Garage door header: siding extends into Accoya frame, flashing removed — no drainage
Object/block placed in door swing of door 11-1 in Bathroom 11
Hydronic heating in master bath: no assembly coordination for bidder-design system
Central vacuum: fixtures keynoted but no equipment, piping, or rough-in details
Blank roof assembly tag on Entry Hall area of East Elevation
Window tag '5' removed from East Elevation — window drawn but untagged
Orphaned keynote tag '13' on A2.01A — no matching legend entry
Sheet list shows deck sections as 'A5.11'; actual sheet is A5.20
Plans cross-reference section A3.04 (shown as A3.10 in callouts); sheet does not exist in set
Extensive TBDs: lighting L3–L11, all appliances — too incomplete for bidding
'OPENING TBD' at Level 2 stair landing — undefined on construction documents
Awning roof slope 1/4":12" is below typical standing seam manufacturer minimums
'Verify in field' on primary building dimensions affecting setback compliance
F-1 floor assembly lacks product specification: species, thickness, installation method
Room Finish Schedule assigns wall type T-1 to Bathroom 11; T-1 never defined in specifications
Spec references 'Detail 1 on page A8.10' but no sheet A8.10 exists in the drawing set
Bottom stair deleted from A2.01B enlarged north plan; stair still visible in interior elevation 8/A7.01
Roof assembly tag R-2 called out on elevation sheets; R-2 not defined on A4.01 (only R-1 defined)
L7 (LED strip) schedule shows count of 2; spec and drawings describe ~75 LF total across three locations
Wall assembly W-3 defined on A4.00 but not tagged on any floor plan; required at Master/Second Bedroom party wall
